title: manisuris protensa
intro: Manisuris protensa, also known as Manis, is a type of plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Manisuris protensa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and combat bacterial and fungal infections. Manisuris protensa is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, or used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
